who: HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR for employee management
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 projects/month, inadequate staffing forecasts cause project delays. We provide proactive staffing alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to effectively forecast staffing needs leading to project delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers posts about staffing solutions
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try employee tracking and gap alerts for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as user-friendly templates
Allow CSV import for easy data entry
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
